description: Egészítsd ki a mondatokat a helyes szerkezettel: There is / There are / There isn't / There aren't / Is there / Are there.

items.sentence: ______ a computer on my desk.
______ two dogs in the garden.
______ a screen in this office. We cannot watch the video.
______ any cars on the street today?
______ many rooms in your new house?
______ a meeting at 9 o'clock. Don't be late!
______ a key in my pocket. I cannot open the door.
______ any problems with the new laptop?
______ a lot of books on the table.
______ any money in the bag. It is empty.
______ a black car next to my house.
______ three pens on your desk?
______ any clean cups in the kitchen. All of them are dirty.
______ a new manager in our team. She starts today.
______ an empty chair near the window?
______ any computers in this room. The room is empty.
______ many people at the meeting right now.
______ a telephone in your bag?
______ a good battery in this phone. It dies very fast.
______ five rooms in their big house.
______ any water in the glass?
______ an error in this line of code.
______ any keys on the floor. I checked everywhere.
______ many students in the lesson today?
______ a big window in my office.
______ a doctor in the building?
______ any petrol in the car. We cannot drive to Nitra.
______ two laptops on the table.
______ any problems with your new job?
______ a physical clock on the wall. We use our phones.
______ a lot of food in the supermarket.
______ any books in your bag?
______ any children in the garden. It is completely quiet.
______ a test on Monday morning.
______ an office for the new employees?
______ a screen on this machine. It is just a box.
______ two sisters in her family.
______ any questions about the project?
______ any money in my bank account. I am poor.
______ a beautiful garden behind the house.
______ a restaurant across the street?
______ any physical documents on the desk. Everything is digital.
______ many blue birds in that old tree.
______ any cars in the garage?
______ a problem with the connection today.
______ a big table in the meeting room.
______ a key to the server room?
______ any employees in the office on weekends.
______ a glass of water on my plate.
______ any files in this folder?
